# truenas_iscsi_portal (Data Source)

Fetches information about an existing TrueNAS iSCSI portal.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_iscsi_portal" "example" {
  id = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the portal.

### Read-Only

- `comment` (String) Description of the portal.
- `listen` (Attributes List) List of IP addresses the portal listens on. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--listen))
- `tag` (Number) The portal group tag.

<a id="nestedatt--listen"></a>
### Nested Schema for `listen`

Read-Only:

- `ip` (String) IP address.
